# Zerrow

> Zerrow connects to your Gmail account and automatically files incoming mail into the folders you actually use, combining deterministic filters with AI classification so your inbox shows only what needs a human.

Zerrow is an AI inbox assistant for Gmail and Google Workspace. It reads every new email, summarizes it, and routes it into user-defined folders in real time — keeping the inbox at zero without manual triage.

## Pages

- [Home](/): What Zerrow is and how AI-powered Gmail sorting works.
- [Sign in](/login): Connect your Gmail account to get started.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How Zerrow collects, uses, and protects your data, including Google user data.
- [Terms & Conditions](/terms): The terms that govern your use of Zerrow.
